literature.title: PLANET: A Multi-objective Graph Neural Network Model for Protein–Ligand Binding Affinity Prediction
literature.journal: Journal of Chemical Information and Modeling

code_repo.readme_description: PLANET (Protein-Ligand Affinity prediction NETwork) is a graph neural network for predicting binding affinity using 3D protein binding pocket structures and 2D ligand molecular graphs via multi-objective training. It achieves competitive virtual screening performance with significantly faster computation times than traditional docking programs.

reproducibility.failure_notes: Instructions for manual preprocessing with Maestro software were provided in readme
